# terrible_community_general_utm_proxy_frontend (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) The name of the object that identifies the entry.

### Optional

- `add_content_type_header` (Boolean) Whether to add the content type header or not.
- `address` (String) The reference name of the network/interface_address object.
- `allowed_networks` (String) A list of reference names for the allowed networks.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `certificate` (String) The reference name of the ca/host_key_cert object.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `comment` (String) An optional comment to add to the object.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `disable_compression` (Boolean) Whether to enable the compression.
- `domain` (String) A list of domain names for the frontend object.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `exceptions` (String) A list of exception ref names (reverse_proxy/exception).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `htmlrewrite` (Boolean) Whether to enable HTML rewrite or not.
- `htmlrewrite_cookies` (Boolean) Whether to enable HTML rewrite cookie or not.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `implicitredirect` (Boolean) Whether to enable implicit redirection or not.
- `lbmethod` (String) Which loadbalancer method should be used.
- `locations` (String) A list of location ref names (reverse_proxy/location).
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `port` (Number) The frontend http port.
- `preservehost` (Boolean) Whether to preserve host header.
- `profile` (String) The reference string of the reverse_proxy/profile.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `status` (Boolean) Whether to activate the frontend entry or not.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `type` (String) Which protocol should be used.
- `xheaders` (Boolean) Whether to pass the host header or not.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `result` (String) The utm object that was created.
